title: Chewy Korean Tofu Stir-fry
description: A fresh and chewy crowd-pleaser Korean dish featuring massaman curry paste, tadka, raw-friendly ingredients.

ingredients.name: Tofu
ingredients.notes: Select extra-firm tofu for best results.

ingredients.name: Garlic
ingredients.notes: Mince garlic for maximum aroma and texture.

ingredients.name: Massaman Curry Paste
ingredients.notes: Use a mild, low-salt variety suitable for stir-frying.

ingredients.name: Red Chilli Pepper
ingredients.notes: Add to taste for heat, keep whole for tadka.

instructions: Heat oil in a wok or large pan over medium-high heat.
Add onion and garlic; sauté until fragrant and translucent. Stir-fry briefly without burning the ingredients.
Add tofu cubes to the wok. Cook for about 5 minutes, flipping occasionally, until just golden brown on the edges.
Sprinkle massaman curry paste over the tofu, stirring well to coat evenly. Simmer for another 2-3 minutes allowing flavors to meld.
While frying, prepare the tadka: Warm some oil in a small pan, add whole red chilli pepper and a pinch of salt. Stir-fry until fragrant and slightly charred.
Stir in tadka ingredients into the tofu. Cook for an additional minute ensuring everything is evenly seasoned.
Fold in green onions just before serving to prevent discoloration. Adjust seasoning if needed, serve hot with steamed rice or noodles.
